debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G✝ H C : Graph α β
S X Y : Set α
M M' : Set β
u v x y z : α
e f : β
P P' : WList α β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G✝ M
G : Graph α β
⊢ ∀ ⦃I B : Set α⦄,
    (∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ I ⊆ V(G, M)) →
      ¬Maximal (fun S => ∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) I →
        Maximal (fun S => ∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) B →
          ∃ x ∈ B \ I, ∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ insert x I ⊆ V(G, M)

        cases hy with

        | inr hyB => exact Set.subset_union_left (hBsubMB hyB)

    exact hcon x ⟨hxB, hxnI⟩ MI hMI (Set.insert_subset (hBsubMB hxB) hIsubMI)

intro I B ⟨MI, hMI, hI⟩ hInotMax hBMax
    simp only [Maximal, not_and, not_forall, Classical.not_imp, not_le] at hInotMax hBMax
    obtain ⟨MB, hMB, hB⟩ := hBMax.1
    by_contra hcon
    push_neg at hcon
    have hBI : B \ I = ∅ := by
      by_contra hne
      obtain ⟨x, hxB, hxI⟩ := Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr hne |>.exists_mem
      exact hcon x ⟨hxB, hxI⟩ MI hMI (Set.subset_insert x I |>.trans (Set.insert_subset (hB hxB) hI))
    rw [Set.diff_eq_empty] at hBI
    have hIB : I ⊆ B := by
      by_contra hne
      obtain ⟨J, ⟨MJ, hMJ, hJ⟩, hIJ⟩ := hInotMax ⟨MI, hMI, hI⟩
      obtain ⟨x, hxJ, hxI⟩ := Set.not_subset.mp hIJ.2
      have hxB : x ∉ B := fun hxB ↦ hxI (hBI hxB)
      exact hBMax.2 ⟨MJ, hMJ, hJ⟩ (Set.insert_subset hxJ hBI) (Set.not_subset.mpr ⟨x, Set.mem_insert x B, hxB⟩)
    exact hInotMax ⟨MI, hMI, hI⟩ |>.elim fun J hJ hIJ ↦ 
      hIJ.2 (hBI.trans (hBMax.2 hJ (hIB.trans hIJ.1)))

intro I B ⟨MI, hMI, hIsub⟩ hInotmax ⟨⟨MB, hMB, hBsub⟩, hBmax⟩

    refine ⟨⟨MI, hMI, hIsub⟩, ?_⟩
    intro J ⟨MJ, hMJ, hJsub⟩ hIJ
    by_contra hJneI
    obtain ⟨x, hxJ, hxnI⟩ : ∃ x ∈ J, x ∉ I := Set.not_subset.mp hJneI
    have hxnB : x ∉ B := fun hxB => hcon x ⟨hxB, hxnI⟩ MJ hMJ (Set.insert_subset (hJsub hxJ) (hIsub.trans fun y hy => hJsub (hIJ hy)))

    exact hxnB (this hxJ)

intro I B ⟨MI, hMI, hI⟩ hInotmax hBmax
    simp only [Maximal, not_and, not_forall, not_le] at hInotmax hBmax
    obtain ⟨MB, hMB, hB⟩ := hBmax.1
    by_contra hcon
    push_neg at hcon
    apply hInotmax ⟨MI, hMI, hI⟩
    intro J ⟨MJ, hMJ, hJ⟩ hIJ
    by_contra hJI
    push_neg at hJI
    obtain ⟨x, hxJ, hxI⟩ := not_subset.mp hJI
    have hxB : x ∈ B := by
      by_contra hxB
      have : x ∈ B \ I := ⟨hxB, hxI⟩
      exact hxB this.1
    have := hcon x ⟨hxB, hxI⟩
    push_neg at this
    obtain ⟨M', hM', hins⟩ := this
    exact hins hM' (Set.insert_subset (hJ hxJ) (hI.trans (fun v hv => hJ (hIJ hv))))

      Set.Subset.antisymm (hBmax' hJ (h.trans hIJ)) hIJ⟩
    obtain ⟨x, hxB, hxI⟩ := Set.not_subset.mp hBI
    exact ⟨x, ⟨hxB, hxI⟩, MB, hMB, Set.insert_subset (hBMB hxB) (hIMI.trans (fun y hy => 
      hBMB (hBmax' hI (Set.subset_insert x I) (Set.mem_insert_of_mem x hy))))⟩

      have : J ⊆ B := by
        intro x hxJ
        by_cases hxI : x ∈ I
        · have : I ⊆ B := fun y hyI => by
            by_contra hyB
            exact hcon y ⟨hyB, hyI⟩ MJ hMJ (Set.subset_trans hIJ hJMJ)
          exact this hxI
        · by_contra hxB
          exact hcon x ⟨hxB, hxI⟩ MJ hMJ (Set.subset_trans hIJ hJMJ)
      exact hBmax ⟨MJ, hMJ, Set.subset_trans this hBMB⟩ this (Set.mem_of_subset_of_mem hIJ hjJ) |> hjI
    exact hcon j ⟨hjB, hjI⟩ MJ hMJ (Set.subset_trans hIJ hJMJ)

intro I B ⟨MI, hMI, hI⟩ hInotmax hBmax
    simp only [Maximal, not_and, not_forall, not_le, exists_prop] at hInotmax hBmax
    obtain ⟨⟨MB, hMB, hB⟩, hBmax'⟩ := hBmax
    by_contra hcon
    push_neg at hcon
    apply hInotmax ⟨MI, hMI, hI⟩
    intro J ⟨MJ, hMJ, hJ⟩ hIJ
    by_contra hJB
    push_neg at hJB
    obtain ⟨x, hxJ, hxB⟩ := hJB
    have hxI : x ∉ I := fun hxI ↦ hxB (hIJ hxI)
    have := hcon x ⟨hxB, hxI⟩
    push_neg at this
    exact this MJ hMJ (Set.insert_subset (hJ hxJ) (hIJ.trans hJ))

intro I B ⟨MI, hMI, hI⟩ hInotMax ⟨⟨MB, hMB, hB⟩, hBmax⟩
    by_contra hcon
    push_neg at hcon
    apply hInotMax
    constructor
    · exact ⟨MI, hMI, hI⟩
    · intro J ⟨MJ, hMJ, hJ⟩ hIJ
      by_contra hJI
      have hne : ∃ x, x ∈ J ∧ x ∉ I := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        exact hJI (fun x hx ↦ h x hx)
      obtain ⟨x, hxJ, hxI⟩ := hne
      have hxB : x ∈ B := by
        by_contra hxB
        have : B ⊂ B ∪ J := by
          constructor
          · exact Set.subset_union_left
          · push_neg
            exact ⟨x, Set.mem_union_right B hxJ, hxB⟩
        have hBJ : ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ B ∪ J ⊆ V(G, M) := by
          sorry
        exact hBmax.not_lt ⟨hBJ, Set.subset_union_left⟩
      have := hcon x ⟨hxB, hxI⟩
      obtain ⟨MIx, hMIx, hIx⟩ := this
      push_neg at hIx
      obtain ⟨y, hyIx, hyV⟩ := hIx
      cases hyIx with
      | inl hy => exact hyV (hI (hIJ hy))
      | inr hy => exact hyV (hJ hxJ)
